metadata.description: Klienta — manage your own Google Ads account through AI chat. Google Ads management + read-only audit skills for Claude Code, powered by the Klienta MCP server.

plugins.name: klienta
plugins.description: Manage your own Google Ads account through AI chat via the Klienta MCP server: a safety-first operating contract for campaign/keyword/budget/ad changes and a strictly read-only account audit playbook (scored health report). Now also includes read-only Meta Ads visibility (accounts, campaigns, ad sets, ads, insights with explicit attribution windows, creatives, delivery diagnosis).
